text.title: mlp-planning Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for mlp-planning as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding more features instead of polishing existing ones when retention is low.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: More features increase scope without addressing the quality gap. Users who left due to rough UX won't return for more features with the same rough UX.

failure-mode.description: Skipping MVP validation and going straight to MLP polish.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Polish on an unvalidated core value is expensive waste. Validate the job-to-be-done first, then polish the delivery.

failure-mode.description: Surface-level polish (color changes, fonts) without addressing interaction quality.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cosmetic polish without fixing interaction friction does not move retention or NPS.

failure-mode.description: Generic delight not tailored to the specific audience.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Confetti on task completion delights consumer app users; it annoys enterprise finance users in the same moment. Delight must match emotional context.

failure-mode.description: Adding Layer 4 delight without completing Layers 1–3.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Delight on top of unreliable or unusable flows increases frustration. Users notice the inconsistency more than the charm.

failure-mode.description: Declaring MLP using vibes instead of remeasured retention and NPS.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without before/after metrics the team will declare MLP based on internal demos, then be surprised when retention is unchanged.
